Standard Contract (Extension)

Signed By: Marc Bergevin

Length: 8 years

Value: $63,000,000

Expiry Status: UFA

Cap Percent : 8.2%

Signing Team: Montreal Canadiens

Signing Date: Oct. 12, 2021

Nick Suzuki signed a 8 year, $63,000,000 contract with the Montreal Canadiens on Oct. 12, 2021. The contract has a cap hit of $7,875,000.
